attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS)

attributes.Sql Query:

STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PVDR_GL_PERIOD_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.RCVR_PERIOD_SET_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.RCVR_PA_PERIOD_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.RCVR_GL_PERIOD_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.GLOBAL_EXP_PERIOD_END_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.EXPENDITURE_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.EXPENDITURE_TYPE_CLASS, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.COST_REJECTION_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.REV_REJECTION_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.TP_REJECTION_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.BURDEN_REJECTION_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.OTHER_REJECTION_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.DELETE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.ERROR_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROVISIONAL_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.ASGMT_SYS_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.CAPACITY_QUANTITY, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.OVERCOMMITMENT_QUANTITY, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.AVAILABILITY_QUANTITY, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.OVERCOMMITMENT_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.AVAILABILITY_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.TP_AMOUNT_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.FORECAST_AMT_CALC_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.COST_TXN_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.TXN_RAW_COST, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.TXN_BURDENED_COST, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.REVENUE_TXN_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.TXN_REVENUE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.TP_TXN_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.TXN_TRANSFER_PRICE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJECT_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJECT_RAW_COST, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJECT_REVENUE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJECT_TRANSFER_PRICE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJFUNC_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJFUNC_REVENUE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROJFUNC_TRANSFER_PRICE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.EXPFUNC_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.EXPFUNC_RAW_COST, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.EXPFUNC_BURDENED_COST, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.EXPFUNC_TRANSFER_PRICE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.OVERPROVISIONAL_QTY, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.OVER_PROV_CONF_QTY, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.CONFIRMED_QTY, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.PROVISIONAL_QTY, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.JOB_ID, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS,
(
select FORECAST_ITEM_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS
minus
select FORECAST_ITEM_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.FORECAST_ITEM_ID = STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.FORECAST_ITEM_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_FORECAST_ITEMS.REFRESH_DATETIME
